## Study: census-of-the-meeting

The Census of the Meeting: the solo-roster null control over 500 seeds. Two goblin-vectored species (goblin, goblin-twin) each placed ALONE, landing in identical cells and diverging only through name-salted noise — the population whose distributional indistinguishability and at-chance blind attribution prove Year-2's measured divergence is attributable to the vectors, not stream noise (spec §4).

Seeds 0..500 × 2 pin set(s); 1000 rows; 0 refusals.
